exams.title: Smart Environments

exams.title: Economics and Computation
exams.description: Mechanism design, computational game theory, selfish routing, and no-regret learning review bank.

exams.title: Economics and Computation — Set 2
exams.description: 100 fresh exam-style questions covering calculations, proof steps, counterexamples, theorem selection, and cross-topic discrimination.

exams.title: Economics and Computation — Basic Pass
exams.description: 90 foundational, high-yield questions for relearning the core definitions, formulas, theorems, and standard examples.

exams.title: Economics and Computation — MC Pass
exams.description: 90 multiple-choice, pass-focused questions covering core definitions, formulas, theorems, standard examples, and common exam distinctions.

exams.title: Economics and Computation — Focus Review
exams.description: 90 focused multiple-choice questions on VCG and multi-parameter mechanisms, mechanisms without money, social choice, and no-regret learning.
